sourceDesc.p: Derived from CDSL MW, PWG, and PWK source records for interoperability analysis.

projectDesc.p: tei-archival-profile-v0.1; TEI is used as the archival/textual model. Raw CDSL records are preserved as escaped source-entry quotes, while selected lexical structures are promoted into TEI entry, form, sense, citation, and relation elements.

revisionDesc.change: Included in the full 50-case machine-reviewed TEI profile.

sense.def: rub one's self with, rub into one's own person)

listBibl.head: Machine-extracted citation index; source quotes preserve the archival text.

bibl.abbr: Journ. of the Am. Or. S. 7,9, Śl. 30.

cit.quote: <L>101170<pc>516,1<k1>DAv<k2>DAv<h>2<e>1 <hom>2.</hom> <s>DAv</s> ¦ <ab>cl.</ab> 1. <ab>P.</ab> <ab>Ā.</ab> <s>DAvati</s>, <s>˚te</s> (<ab>pf.</ab> <s>daDAva</s>, <ls>Bhaṭṭ.</ls>; <ab>aor.</ab> <s>-aDAvizwa</s>, <ls>RV. ix, 70, 8</ls>; <ab>ind.p.</ab> <s>DOtvA</s>, <ls>Prab. iv, 23</ls> [<ab>v.l.</ab> <s>DUtvA</s>] and <s>-DAvya</s>, <ls>Kauś.</ls>) <div n="to"/>to rinse, cleanse, wash, purify, polish, make bright (<ab>Ā.</ab> also to rub one's self with, rub into one's own person), <ls>RV.</ls> &c. &c.: <div n="vp"/><ab>Pass.</ab> <s>DAvyate</s> (<ab>pf.</ab> 3. <ab>pl.</ab> <s>-daDAvire</s>), <ls>Śiś.</ls> : <div n="vp"/><ab>Caus.</ab> <s>DAvayati</s>, <s>˚te</s>, to cleanse, wash, <ls>Br.</ls>; <ls>Mn.</ls>; <ls>MBh.</ls> &c.; <div n="vp"/> cause to be washed, <ls>L.</ls> : <div n="vp"/><ab>Desid.</ab> <s>diDAvizati</s>, <s>˚te</s>; <div n="vp"/> <ab>Intens.</ab> <s>dADAvyate</s> <ab>Gr.</ab><info whitneyroots="DAv2,82"/><info verb="genuineroot" cp="1P,1Ā"/> <LEND>

<L>36704<pc>3-0952<k1>DAv<k2>DAv<h>1
1. {#DAv#}¦ (<ab>vgl.</ab> {#Dav, Danv), DA/vati#} und {#˚te#} (seltener)
<ls>DHĀTUP. 15,92</ls> ({#gatO#}).
<ls>P. 7,3,78</ls> ({#DO#}).
<div n="1"> 1) {%rinnen, hervorströmen, rinnen nach, in%}
<ls>NIR. 13,6.</ls> {#tara\tsa ma\ndI DA^vati#}
<ls>ṚV. 9,58,1.</ls> <ls n="ṚV. 9,">21,1.</ls> {#a\yaM sarA^Msi DAvati#}
<ls n="ṚV. 9,">54,2.</ls> <ls n="ṚV.">6,17,4.</ls> {#retaH siktamaDAvat#}
<ls>AIT. BR. 3,33.</ls> {#ApaH#}
<ls>KĀṬH. 23,6. 8.</ls>
<ls>AV. 10,6,14.</ls> {#gaNgA yatra saricCrezWA maDye DAvati#}
<ls>HARIV. 14516.</ls> {#ASukArI DAvatyamBasi tElavat#}
<ls>SUŚR. 1,247,13.</ls> {#DAvadDukkAraDArAbaDirita#} <ab>Inschr.</ab> in
<ls>Journ. of the Am. Or. S. 7,9, Śl. 30.</ls> {#tuBya^M DAvanti De\nava^H#} {%rinnen%} so <ab>v. a.</ab> {%geben Flüssigkeit, Milch%}
<ls>ṚV. 9,66,6.</ls> In der <ab>folg.</ab> Stelle <ab>Bed.</ab> 1 und 2: {#eza su^vA\naH pari\ soma^H pa\vitre\ sargo\ na sf\zwo a^daDAva\darvA^#}
<ls>ṚV. 9,87,7.</ls>
<div n="1">— 2) {%rennen, laufen, umherlaufen; davonlaufen; zulaufen auf, rennen gegen%}: {#yadDAva^si triyoja\nam#}
<ls>AV. 6,131,3.</ls> {#Ajim#} {%einen Wettlauf anstellen%}
[Page3-0953]
<ls>AIT. BR. 4,8.</ls>
<ls>ŚAT. BR. 5,1,4,1.</ls> {#yaTA parAYcaM DAvantamanulipseta#}
<ls n="ŚAT. BR.">3,2,1,36.</ls> {#na sarvaM javaM DAvati#}
<ls>ŚĀṄKH. BR. 18,1.</ls>
<ls>VS. 16,20.</ls> {#mf\gaH sf\tiM yati\ DAvA\daju^zwAm#}
<ls>AV. 10,3,6.</ls> {#yasyA^gniho\tre^ 'DiSri^te\ SvAnta\rA DAva^ti#}
<ls>TBR. 1,4,3,6.</ls>
<ls>ĀŚV. GṚHY. 3,9.</ls> {#DAva^dBirhU\yate\ yaSca^ ji\gyuBi^H#} {%fliehend%}
<ls>ṚV. 1,101,6.</ls>
<ls>AV. 5,20,5.</ls> <ls n="AV. 5,">21,2.</ls> <ls n="AV.">8,8,19.</ls>
<ls>KATHOP. 6,3.</ls> <ls>AIT. UP. 2,8.</ls> — {#DAvanbalADiko yaH syAt#} {%wer schneller laufen sollte%}
<ls>KATHĀS. 3,51.</ls> {#DAvantyamI — raTyAH#}
<ls>ŚĀK. 8.</ls>
<ls>SĀH. D. 11,22.</ls> <ls n="SĀH. D.">13,4.</ls> {#DAvatKura#}
<ls>PRAB. 79,6.</ls> {#rAjA stenena gantavyo muktakeSena DAvatA#}
<ls>M. 8,314.</ls> {#itaScetaSca DAvati#}
<ls>MBH. 3,2380.</ls>
<ls>HIT. I,136.</ls> {#unmattAviva DAvataH#}
<ls>SĀV. 6,5.</ls>
<ls>R. GORR. 2,62,22.</ls> <ls n="R. GORR.">3,50,11.</ls> <ls n="R. GORR.">4,47,15.</ls>
<ls>BHARTṚ. 3,45.</ls> {#divi DAvati BUtaBedaH#}
<ls>BHĀG. P. 3,11,15.</ls>
<ls>RĀJA-TAR. 5,409.</ls> {#paScAdDAvaMstu DAvataH#} {%hinterherlaufend%}
<ls>M. 2,196.</ls>
<ls>HIT. 14,9.</ls> {#DAvitvA#}
<ls>KATHĀS. 18,37.</ls> <ls n="KATHĀS. 18,">282.</ls> {#aDAvIccArisaMmuKam#}
<ls>BHAṬṬ. 15,67.</ls> {#vanagulmAMSca DAvantaH#} {%laufend in%}
<ls>MBH. 3,2543.</ls> {#yaTA DAvati gOrvatsaM sravantI vatsalA payaH#} {%nachlaufen%}
<ls n="MBH.">13,3132.</ls> {#buBukzayA pIqyamAno vizayAneva DAvati#}
<ls n="MBH.">14,681.</ls> {#Aruhya Saktidevo 'SvamaDAvatsUkaraM prati#} {%sprengen, reiten%}
<ls>KATHĀS. 26,172.</ls> {#aMsapfzWe 'Ta DAvantaM karam#} {%die hingleitende Hand%}
<ls>RĀJA-TAR. 4,425.</ls> {#kAlasya cAvyaktagateryo 'ntarDAvati jantuzu#}
<ls>BHĀG. P. 3,32,37.</ls> {#adyApi DAvati manaH#}
<ls>CAURAP. 37.</ls> {#praBURAM hi viBUtyanDA DAvatyavizaye matiH#}
<ls>KATHĀS. 17,138.</ls> {#gacCati puraH SarIraM DAvati paScAdasaMstutaM cetaH#}
<ls>ŚĀK. 33.</ls> {#DarmasyADarmamudvfttaM nihantuM DAvataH#}
<ls>RĀJA-TAR. 6,61.</ls> <ab>med.</ab>: {#di\vaspf\zWe DAva^mAnaM supa\rRam#}
<ls>AV. 13,2,37.</ls> {#ca\ndramA^ a\psva1^\ntarA su^pa\rRo DA^vate di\vi#}
<ls>ṚV. 1,105,1.</ls> {#DU\mena^ DAvate di\vi#}
<ls n="ṚV.">6,48,6.</ls> <ls>VS. 20,40.</ls> {#satataM DAvamAnaH#}
<ls>MBH. 3,12929.</ls> {#nftyate kUjate cEva DAvate calate taTA#}
<ls>VET. 30,15.</ls>
<ls>BHĀG. P. 4,11,20.</ls> <ls n="BHĀG. P.">5,26,15.</ls> {#tridaSAMScApyaDAvanta#} {%losrennen auf%}
<ls>MBH. 3,8854.</ls>
<ls>R. 6,13,27.</ls> {#DAvita#} {%rennend, laufend%}: {#evamastviti tO mUQO DAvitO#} {%fingen an zu laufen%}
<ls>KATHĀS. 3,52.</ls>
<div n="p">— <ab>caus.</ab>
<div n="1"> 1) {%laufen lassen, zum Laufen antreiben%}: {#yadi KalInaM muKe prakzipyAhaM tava pfzWe samAruhya tvAM DAvayAmi . DAvitastu yadyaSvavadDezase#}
<ls>PAÑCAT. 223,12.</ls>
<div n="1">— 2) {%fahren, sich fahren lassen%}: {#vAhanena#}
<ls>ŚAT. BR. 1,8,2,9.</ls> {#aDvAnam#}
<ls>PAÑCAV. BR. 6,3,15. 16,13,11.</ls> {#DAvayanbrAhmakumAraM raTena vyacCinat#}
<ls n="PAÑCAV. BR.">13,3,12.</ls> <ls>ŚAT. BR. 2,1,1,5.</ls> <ls n="ŚAT. BR.">10,3,5,2.</ls> <ls n="ŚAT. BR.">11,4,1,1.</ls> <ls n="ŚAT. BR. 11,">6,2,1.</ls> <ls n="ŚAT. BR.">12,4,1,10.</ls> Hierher vielleicht auch
<ls>ṚV. 10,146,2.</ls> In der Stelle {#devakIstana DAvayantI#}
<ls>Z. d. d. m. G. 6,93</ls> ist wohl {#˚stanaM DayantIm#} zu lesen.
<div n="p">— {#ati#} {%hinrinnen über, vorüberlaufen%}: {#(somaH) a\ti hvarA^Msi DAvati#}
<ls>ṚV. 9,3,2.</ls>
<ls>AV. 5,8,4.</ls>
<div n="p">— {#anu#}
<div n="1"> 1) {%zufliessen, durchströmen%}: {#anveka^M DAvasi pU\yamA^naH#}
<ls>ṚV. 9,97,55.</ls> {#SarIram#}
<ls>SUŚR. 1,43,8. 44,11.</ls> {#dozaM dozaH#}
<ls n="SUŚR.">83,4.</ls> {#vAyuH#}
<ls n="SUŚR.">328,16.</ls> {%durchdringen, sich verbreiten durch, über%}: {#kaccitte mantrito mantro na rAzwramanuDAvati#} (<ab>vgl.</ab> <ab>u.</ab> {#pari#} 2.
) so <ab>v. a.</ab> {%im ganzen Reiche bekannt werden%}
<ls>R. GORR. 2,109,13.</ls>
<div n="1">— 2) {%nachlaufen, verfolgen%} (in freundlicher oder feindlicher Absicht): {#a\mitrA\nanu^ DAvata#}
<ls>AV. 11,10,1.</ls> <ls n="AV.">5,21,10.</ls> <ls n="AV.">20,136,11.</ls>
<ls>ŚAT. BR. 2,3,4,11.</ls>
<ls>MBH. 3,13178.</ls> <ls n="MBH.">4,1260.</ls> {#vatsalatvAdyaTA DenuH svaputramanuDAvati#}
<ls>R. GORR. 2,25,8.</ls> <ls n="R. GORR.">3,51,27.</ls> <ls n="R. GORR. 3,">58,39.</ls> <ls>KATHĀS. 13,28.</ls> {#hayArohAH sahasraDA . anvaDAvan#}
<ls n="KATHĀS.">18,93.</ls> <ls>BHĀG. P. 3,31,36.</ls> <ls n="BHĀG. P.">4,11,20.</ls> <ls>DAŚAK.</ls> in <ls>BENF. Chr. 200,11.</ls> {#avijYAya PalaM yo hi karma tvevAnuDAvati#} {%nachgehen%}
<ls>DAŚ. 1,8.</ls> <ab>med.</ab>: {#anvaDAvata pARqyeSaM jyotsneva rajanIkaram#}
<ls>BHĀG. P. 4,28,34.</ls>
<div n="1">— 3) {%herbeieilen zu, Jmd zu Hülfe eilen%}
<ls>MBH. 1,7095.</ls> {#mAmiha vane grasyamAnAm — graheRAnena vijane kimarTaM nAnuDAvasi#}
<ls n="MBH.">3,2384.</ls>
<div n="v">— <ab>Vgl.</ab> {#anuDAvana#}
<ls n="MBH. 3,">1.</ls>
<div n="p">— {#samanu#} {%nachlaufen, verfolgen%}: {#(DanaMjayam) samanvaDAvan#} (so ist zu
[Page3-0954]
lesen)
<ls>MBH. 8,4086.</ls>
<div n="p">— {#apa#}
<div n="1"> 1) {%weglaufen%}: {#apa^ DAvatAmartyA\ martyA\nmA sa^caDvam#}
<ls>AV. 4,37,12.</ls>
<ls>ŚAT. BR. 4,1,1,26.</ls>
<div n="1">— 2) {%abgehen von einer früheren Aussage, Etwas aussagen was mit einer früheren Aussage nicht übereinstimmt%}: {#apadiSyApadeSyaM ca punaryastvapaDAvati#}
<ls>M. 8,54.</ls>
<div n="p">— {#aBi#} {%zufliessen; herbeilaufen, zulaufen auf, hineilen zu, losrennen auf%} (in freundlicher oder feindlicher Absicht): {#(vfzA) a\Bi droRA^ni DAvati#}
<ls>ṚV. 9,28,4.</ls> <ls n="ṚV. 9,">37,6.</ls> <ls n="ṚV. 9,">60,3.</ls> {#kAnteva kftasaMketA samudramaBiDAvati (nadI)#}
<ls>R. 4,41,24.</ls> {%rasch entgegengehen%}
<ls>PĀR. GṚHY. 2,8.</ls> {#grAmaGAte hitABaNge paTi mozABidarSane . Saktito nABiDAvanto nirvAsyAH#}
<ls>M. 9,274.</ls>
<ls>DRAUP. 6,10. 27. 8,55.</ls> {#pradIpya yaH pradIptAgniM prAkciraM nABiDAvati . BasmApi na sa vindeta SizwaM kva ca na#}
<ls>MBH. 2,2130.</ls> <ls n="MBH.">3,427.</ls> <ls n="MBH. 3,">2609.</ls> <ls n="MBH.">4,193.</ls> <ls n="MBH.">6,76.</ls> <ls n="MBH.">16,47.</ls>
<ls>R. 1,55,6.</ls> <ls n="R.">3,26,8</ls> <ls n="R.">6,18,7.</ls>
<ls>VARĀH. BṚH. S. 88,19.</ls>
<ls>KATHĀS. 15,50.</ls> <ls n="KATHĀS.">26,173.</ls> <ls n="KATHĀS. 26,">244.</ls>
<ls>BHĀG. P. 1,8,8.</ls> <ls n="BHĀG. P.">3,18,16.</ls> {#marIcitoyaprAyAMstAn (vizayAn) evABiDAvati#}
<ls n="BHĀG. P.">5,14,10.</ls> <ls n="BHĀG. P. 5,">24,2.</ls> <ls n="BHĀG. P.">8,2,32.</ls> <ab>med.</ab> <ls>ARJ. 3,24.</ls> <ls>MBH. 16,225.</ls> <ls>R. 1,41,27.</ls> <ls n="R.">2,40,42.</ls> <ls n="R. 2,">100,27.</ls> <ls n="R.">3,51,4.</ls> <ls n="R.">6,18,7.</ls> <ls>BHAṬṬ. 6,41.</ls> — In der Stelle {#yatsa^Mga\rama^Bi\DAvA^mi#}
<ls>AV. 6,119,3</ls> würde die Bedeutung {%entgegenhandeln%} passen oder ist <ab>viell.</ab> {#atiDAvAmi#} {%überschreiten, übertreten%} zu lesen?
<div n="v">— <ab>Vgl.</ab> {#aBiDAvaka#} .
<div n="p">— {#pratyaBi#} {%hineilen zu%}: {#kOtUhalAjjanOGasya saBAM pratyaBiDAvataH (prati)#} (könnte auch mit {#saBAM#} verbunden werden)
<ls>R. GORR. 2,82,13.</ls>
<div n="p">— {#samaBi#} {%herbeieilen, losrennen auf, fliegen gegen%}
<ls>MBH. 6,3119.</ls> <ls n="MBH. 6,">5588.</ls>
<ls>R. 3,32,36.</ls> <ls n="R.">5,61,10.</ls> {#adya tURISayA vARA nirmuktA iva pannagAH . rAmaM samaBiDAvantu#}
<ls n="R.">6,34,23.</ls> <ab>med.</ab> <ls n="R. 6,">19,23.</ls>
<div n="p">— {#ava#} {%herabrinnen, herabträufeln%}: {#yatte\ gAtrA^da\gninA^ pa\cyamA^nAda\Bi SUla\M niha^tasyAva\DAva^ti#}
<ls>ṚV. 1,162,11.</ls> {#a\do yada^va\DAva^tyava\tkamaDi\ parva^tAt#}
<ls>AV. 2,3,1.</ls>
<div n="p">— {#vyava#} {%auseinander laufen, sich von einander trennen%}: {#evaM BAryASca putrASca jYAtayaSca vasUni . sametya vyavaDAvanti#}
<ls>R. 2,105,25.</ls> {%weglaufen von%}: {#vyavaDAvettatastUrRaM sasarpAcCaraRAdiva#}
<ls>MBH. 12,10599.</ls>
<div n="p">— {#A#}
<div n="1"> 1) {%herbeirinnen%}: {#A ka\laSe^zu DAvati#}
<ls>ṚV. 9,17,4.</ls> <ls n="ṚV. 9,">67,14.</ls>
<div n="1">— 2) {%Etwas%} (<ab>acc.</ab>) {%herbeiströmen%}: {#A na^H sutAsa indavaH punA\nA DA^vatA ra\yim#}
<ls>ṚV. 9,106,9.</ls>
<div n="1">— 3) {%herbeilaufen, herbeieilen zu, heimkehren; losrennen auf%}: {#a\smA~ acCA^ suma\tirvA\mA De\nuri^va DAvatu#}
<ls>ṚV. 8,22,4.</ls>
<ls>LĀṬY. 5,12,16.</ls>
<ls>ŚAT. BR. 1,1,4,12.</ls> {#sa\rvata^stvA\ diSa\ A^ DAvantu#}
<ls>VS. 6,36.</ls> {#ADAvattadasaMKyeyaM SuSuBe sarvato balam#}
<ls>HARIV. 10497.</ls>
<ls>R. 4,18,20.</ls> {#ADAvanto BawAnmfDe#}
<ls>BHĀG. P. 8,10,39.</ls> <ab>med.</ab>: {#BayAdADAvamAnAH#}
<ls>MBH. 3,2544.</ls>
<div n="p">— {#anvA#} {%nach Jmd herlaufen%}
<ls>KĀṬH. 13,4.</ls>
<div n="p">— {#upA#} {%hinlaufen zu%}: {#jalakAmyyA . mfgatfzRAmupADAvet#}
<ls>BHĀG. P. 7,13,28.</ls> — <ab>caus.</ab> {%hinfahren zu%}: {#nirUQaSirasamagnimupADAvayAM cakruH#}
<ls>ŚAT. BR. 10,5,5,8.</ls>
<div n="p">— {#samA#} {%in Gesellschaft herbeilaufen%}: {#tato mfgAH samADAvanyatra tizWati keSavaH#}
<ls>HARIV. 14566.</ls> {%heranlaufen%}: {#sadaSvavatsamADAvat#} (lies {#˚van) baBAze tadanantaram#}
<ls>MBH. 5,2763.</ls>
<div n="p">— {#upa#} {%herzulaufen, hineilen zu; die Zuflucht nehmen zu, um Hülfe angehen%}: {#upaDAvantyAH karO cicCeda#}
<ls>R. 1,28,16.</ls>
<ls>TS. 2,1,1,1.</ls> {#kvacidAtapodaniBAnvizayAnupaDAvati#}
<ls>BHĀG. P. 5,14,6.</ls> {#prARaprepsurupADAvadvanam#}
<ls>MBH. 3,15748.</ls>
<ls>HARIV. 12235.</ls> {#taM yadyupa vA DaveyuraBayaM vecCeran#}
<ls>AIT. BR. 1,30.</ls>
[Page3-0955]
{#varuRaM rAjAnamupaDAva#}
<ls n="AIT. BR.">7,14.</ls> <ls n="AIT. BR. 7,">16.</ls> <ls n="AIT. BR.">8,10.</ls> <ls>ŚAT. BR. 1,6,2,7. fgg.</ls> <ls n="ŚAT. BR. 1,">7,4,8.</ls> <ls n="ŚAT. BR.">3,2,3,3.</ls> <ls>PAÑCAV. BR. 12,13,4.</ls> <ls>ŚĀṄKH. ŚR. 14,7,4.</ls> <ls>CHĀND. UP. 1,3,8. fgg.</ls> <ls>BHĀG. P. 4,7,38.</ls> <ls n="BHĀG. P. 4,">8,74.</ls> <ls n="BHĀG. P.">5,3,13.</ls> <ls n="BHĀG. P. 5,">18,1.</ls> <ls n="BHĀG. P.">8,1,11.</ls> — <ab>med.</ab> {%laufen, gleiten%}: {#viSve^zA\M tmanA\ SoBi^zWa\mupe^va di\vi DAva^mAnam#}
<ls>ṚV. 8,3,21.</ls>
<div n="p">— {#samupa#} {%heranlaufen an%}: {#damayantI tu yaM haMsaM samupADAvadantike#}
<ls>MBH. 3,2097.</ls>
<div n="p">— {#nis#}
<div n="1"> 1) {%hervorströmen, entspringen%}: {#sadAnIretyuttarAdgirernirDAvati#}
<ls>ŚAT. BR. 1,4,1,14.</ls>
<div n="1">— 2) {%hinauslaufen, hinauseilen, entrinnen aus%}
<ls>HARIV. 11020.</ls> {#yaccAsmAdBagavaMstrEDAtukAnnirDAvitA nirvARasaMjYino vayaM ca jarAjIrRAH#}
<ls>SADDH. P. 4,6,a.</ls>
<div n="p">— {#parA#} {%weglaufen%}: {#parA\ hI^ndra\ DAva^si vf\zAka^pe\rati\ vyaTi^H#}
<ls>ṚV. 10,86,2.</ls>
<div n="p">— {#pari#}
<div n="1"> 1) {%umherfliessen, umherrinnen um, in%}
<ls>MBH. 5,7367.</ls> {#indro\ yatpa\vitra^M pari\DAva^si#}
<ls>ṚV. 9,24,5.</ls> {#avyo\ vAre\ pari^ DAva\ maDu^ pri\yam#}
<ls n="ṚV. 9,">86,48.</ls> {#pari^ te\ DArA^ su\tasya^ DAvati#}
<ls n="ṚV. 9,">100,4.</ls> {#pari taM sarasvatI samantaM paryaDAvat#}
<ls>AIT. BR. 2,19.</ls> {#kupitAnAM dozARAM SarIraM pariDAvatAm#}
<ls>SUŚR. 1,91,5.</ls>
<div n="1">— 2) {%herumlaufen%}: {#pariDAvannaTa nala itaScetaSca#}
<ls>MBH. 3,2350.</ls> <ls n="MBH. 3,">2597.</ls> <ls n="MBH.">16,278.</ls>
<ls>HARIV. 16004.</ls>
<ls>R. 2,33,19.</ls> <ls n="R. 2,">61,10.</ls> <ls n="R. 2,">91,60.</ls> <ls n="R.">3,75,40.</ls>
<ls>PAÑCAT. 62,23.</ls>
<ls>BHĀG. P. 3,17,11.</ls> <ls n="BHĀG. P.">5,14,8.</ls> <ab>med.</ab> <ls>MBH. 1,6197.</ls> <ls n="MBH.">3,2374.</ls> <ls>R. 4,47,16.</ls> {#Aruhya yAnaM pariDAvatAM BavAn#} {%herumfahren%}
<ls>MBH. 4,302.</ls> {#mfgayAm#} {%auf der Jagd herumlaufen, jagen%}; <ab>act.</ab>
<ls>MBH. 1,4596.</ls> <ls n="MBH.">3,12373.</ls>
<ls>R. 5,30,8.</ls> {%herumlaufen um%} (<ab>acc.</ab>), {%sich um Jmd herum bewegen, umlaufen%}
<ls>AV. 20,136,10.</ls> {#(SukraH) BuvanaM pariDAvati#}

<L>55351<pc>3-159-c<k1>DAv<k2>DAv<h>1 <hom>1.</hom> √{#DAv#}¦, {#DA/vati, ˚te#} (selten) <div n="1">— 1〉 {%rinnen, hervorströmen, rinnen nach oder in%} (<ab>Loc.</ab>), {%zu Jmd%} (<ab>Dat.</ab>). <div n="1">— 2〉 {%rennen, laufen, umherlaufen, herbeilaufen%} (<ls n="Chr.">133,4</ls>), {%zulaufen zu%} ({#˚aBimuKam#} <ls n="Chr.">153,4</ls>), {%losrennen auf%} (<ab>Acc.</ab> oder {#˚saMmuKam#}), {%laufen in%} (<ab>Acc.</ab>), {%nachlaufen%} (mit <ab>Acc.</ab>). {#Aji/m#} {%einen Wettlauf anstellen,%} {#sarvajavam#} {%so schnell als möglich laufen%}. {#DAvitO#} in der <ab>Bed.</ab> des <ab>Verb.</ab> <ab>fin.</ab> {%fingen an zu laufen%}. <div n="1">— 3〉 {%davonlaufen, fliehen%}. <div n="1">— 4〉 {%sprengen, reiten, losreiten auf%} ({#prati#}). <div n="1">— 5〉 {%schwimmen%} (vom Fisch). <div n="1">— 6〉 von der Hand {%hingleiten über%} (<ab>Loc.</ab>). <div n="1">— 7〉 {%laufen, nachlaufen%} (mit <ab>Loc.</ab>) von Unkörperlichem, <ab>insbes.</ab> vom Herzen. <div n="m">— <ab>Caus.</ab> {#DAva/yati#} <div n="1">— 1〉 {%laufen lassen, zum Laufen antreiben%}. <div n="1">— 2〉 {%fahren, sich fahren lassen;%} mit <ab>Instr.</ab> des Vehikels und <ab>Acc.</ab> des Weges. <div n="1">— 3〉 {%hüpfen, tanzen%} <ls>ṚV. 10,146,2</ls>. <div n="p">— Mit {#ati#} {%hinrinnen über%} (<ab>Acc.</ab>) {%vorüberlaufen%}. <div n="p">— Mit {#anu#} <div n="1">— 1〉 {%zufliessen, durchströmen;%} mit <ab>Acc.</ab> <div n="1">— 2〉 {%nachlaufen, verfolgen%} (in freundlicher oder feindlicher Absicht); mit <ab>Acc.</ab> <div n="1">— 3〉 {%herbeieilen zu, Jmd%} (<ab>Acc.</ab>) {%zu Hülfe eilen%}. <div n="1">— 4〉 einer Sache (<ab>Acc.</ab>) {%nachgehen%}. <div n="1">— 5〉 {%sich verbreiten durch%} (<ab>Acc.</ab>), so <ab>v. a.</ab> {%allgemein bekannt werden in%}. <div n="m">— <ab>Caus.</ab> {%durchfahren,%} mit <ab>Acc.</ab> <ls>AIT. ĀR. 148,15</ls>. <div n="p">— Mit {#samanu#} {%nachlaufen, Jmd%} (<ab>Acc.</ab>) {%verfolgen%} <ls>MBH. 8,79,92</ls>. <div n="p">— Mit {#apa#} <div n="1">— 1〉 {%weglaufen%}. <div n="1">— 2〉 {%abgehen von einer früheren [Page3-160-a] Aussage, hinterher etwas Anderes aussagen%}. <div n="p">— Mit {#api#} {%hineinlaufen in%} (<ab>Acc.</ab>) <ls>VAITĀN.</ls> <div n="p">— Mit {#aBi#} <div n="1">— 1〉 {%hinströmen —, hinfliessen zu%} (<ab>Acc.</ab>). <div n="1">— 2〉 {%herbeilaufen, zulaufen, hineilen zu, losrennen auf (in freundlicher oder feindlicher Absicht), beispringen, zu Hülfe eilen;%} mit <ab>Acc.</ab> <div n="1">— 3〉 <ls>AV. 6,119,3</ls> viel leicht fehlerhaft für {#ati#} {%überschreiten, übertreten%}. <div n="p">— Mit {#pratyaBi#} {%hineilen zu%} (<ab>Acc.</ab>). <div n="p">— Mit {#samaBi#} {%herbeieilen, losrennen auf, fliegen gegen%} (<ab>Acc.</ab>). <div n="p">— Mit {#ava#} {%herabrinnen, herabträufeln von%} (<ab>Abl.</ab>). <div n="p">— Mit {#vyava#} <div n="1">— 1〉 {%auseinander laufen, sich von einander trennen%}. <div n="1">— 2〉 {%weglaufen von%} (<ab>Abl.</ab>). <div n="p">— Mit {#A#} <div n="1">— 1〉 {%herbeirinnen, hinströmen zu%} (<ab>Loc.</ab>). <div n="1">— 2〉 {%herbeilaufen, herbeieilen zu, heimkehren; losrennen auf%} (<ab>Acc.</ab>). <div n="p">— Mit {#anvA#} {%nach Jmd herlaufen%}. <div n="p">— Mit {#upA#} {%hinlaufen zu%} (<ab>Acc.</ab>). <div n="m">— <ab>Caus.</ab> {%hinfahren zu%} (<ab>Acc.</ab>). <div n="p">— Mit {#samA#} {%zusammen herbeilaufen, heranlaufen%}. <div n="p">— Mit {#upa#} <div n="1">— 1〉 {%herzulaufen, hineilen —, die Zuflucht nehmen zu, um Hülfe angehen;%} mit <ab>Acc.</ab> <div n="1">— 2〉 <ab>Med.</ab> {%laufen, gleiten%}. <div n="p">— Mit {#samupa#} {%heranlaufen an%} (<ab>Acc.</ab>). <div n="p">— Mit {#nis#} <div n="1">— 1〉 {%hervorströmen —, entspringen aus%} (<ab>Abl.</ab>). <div n="1">— 2〉 {%hinauslaufen, — eilen, entfahren%} (von Pfeilen), {%entrinnen aus%} (<ab>Abl.</ab>). <div n="p">— Mit {#parA#} {%weglaufen%}. <div n="p">— Mit {#pari#} <div n="1">— 1〉 {%umherfliessen, umherrinnen um oder in, durchströmen%}. <div n="1">— 2〉 {%herumlaufen%}. {#mfgayAm#} {%auf der Jagd,%} so <ab>v. a.</ab> {%jagen%}. <div n="1">— 3〉 {%herumfahren%}. <div n="1">— 4〉 {%herumlaufen —, sich herumbewegen um, umlaufen;%} mit <ab>Acc.</ab> <div n="1">— 5〉 {%herumlaufen in, durchlaufen;%} in <ab>übertr.</ab> <ab>Bed.</ab> so <ab>v. a.</ab> {%allgemein bekannt werden in%} (<ab>Acc.</ab>). <div n="1">— 6〉 {%herbeilaufen%}. <div n="1">— 7〉 {%nachlaufen,%} mit <ab>Acc.</ab> <div n="m">— <ab>Caus.</ab> {%umringen, umzingeln%}. <div n="p">— Mit {#vipari#} {%herumlaufen, — in oder auf, durchlaufen%}. <div n="p">— Mit {#pra#} <div n="1">— 1〉 {%hervorrinnen, fortrinnen%}. <div n="1">— 2〉 {%fortlaufen, sich aufmachen, sich auf den Weg machen%}. {#praDAvita#} {%davongelaufen, der sich auf den Weg gemacht hat%}. <div n="1">— 3〉 {%losstürzen%}. <div n="1">— 4〉 {%laufen%}. <div n="1">— 5〉 {%laufen —, sich begeben zu%} (<ab>Acc.</ab>) <ls n="Chr.">81,31</ls>. {#dUrataram#} {%in weite Fernen%} (vom Herzen). <div n="1">— 6〉 {%sich verbreiten über, durchdringen%}. {#kroSAt#} {%einen%} <is>Krośa</is> {%weit sich verbreiten%} (von einem Geruch). <div n="m">— <ab>Caus.</ab> <div n="1">— 1〉 {%in die Flucht schlagen%}. <div n="1">— 2〉 {%wegfahren, fahren%}. <div n="p">— Mit {#aDipra#} {%herbeieilen aus%} (<ab>Abl.</ab>). <div n="p">— Mit {#anupra#} {%nachlaufen,%} mit <ab>Acc.</ab> {#˚DAvita#} mit <ab>act.</ab> <ab>Bed.</ab> <div n="m">— <ab>Caus.</ab> {%nachfahren%}. <div n="p">— Mit {#vipra#} {%auseinanderlaufen%}. <div n="p">— Mit {#saMpra#} <div n="1">— 1〉 {%fortlaufen, forteilen, fliehen%}. <div n="1">— 2〉 {%hineilen zu,%} so <ab>v. a.</ab> {%sich hingezogen fühlen zu%} (<ab>Loc.</ab>). <div n="p">— Mit {#prati#} <div n="1">— 1〉 {%zurücklaufen%}. <div n="1">— 2〉 {%auf Jmd%} (<ab>Acc.</ab>) {%losrennen%} (in feindlicher Absicht). <div n="p">— Mit {#vi#} <div n="1">— 1〉 {%hinrinnen durch, durchsickern, sich verlaufen%} (vom Wasser) {%in%} (<ab>Loc.</ab>). <div n="1">— 2〉 {%auseinanderlaufen, zerstreut [Page3-160-b] laufen, weglaufen%}. {#viDAvita#} {%auseinandergelaufen%} <ls>MBH. 9,20,9</ls>. <div n="1">— 3〉 {%laufen von einem Wege,%} so <ab>v. a.</ab> {%gehen zwischen%} ({#antar#}). <div n="1">— 4〉 {%durchlaufen%}. <div n="1">— 5〉 {%auf Jmd losrennen%}. <div n="p">— Mit {#anuvi#} <div n="1">— 1〉 {%hineinrinnen —, einsickern in%} (<ab>Acc.</ab>). <div n="1">— 2〉 {%durchströmen%}. <div n="1">— 3〉 {%nach einem Andern%} (<ab>Acc.</ab>) {%auseinanderrinnen, — sich verlaufen%}. <div n="p">— Mit {#aBivi#} {%herbeieilen zu%} (<ab>Acc.</ab>). <div n="p">— Mit {#parivi#} {%rings durchlaufen%}. {#SAKAs#} {%von Ast zu Ast laufen%}. <div n="p">— Mit {#sam#} <div n="1">— 1〉 {%zusammenlaufen%}. <div n="1">— 2〉 {%losrennen auf%}. <div n="1">— 3〉 {%hinlaufen zu,%} so <ab>v. a.</ab> {%gelangen zu%} (<ab>Acc.</ab>) <ls>MBH. 12,280,45</ls>. <LEND>
